description:
You are a graduate student in environmental science using TiddlyWiki (http://localhost:8080/) as your research knowledge base. Build a bibliography reference system by creating five reference tiddlers with the following specifications:

- Title: "Global warming of 1.5°C"; Tags: Reference, Climate; Fields: author: Masson-Delmotte V, Zhai P, Pörtner HO, et al.; year: 2018; journal: IPCC Special Report; doi: 10.1017/9781009157940
- Title: "Biodiversity loss and its impact on humanity"; Tags: Reference, Biodiversity; Fields: author: Cardinale BJ, Duffy JE, Gonzalez A, et al.; year: 2012; journal: Nature; doi: 10.1038/nature11148
- Title: "Planetary boundaries: Guiding human development on a changing planet"; Tags: Reference, Sustainability; Fields: author: Steffen W, Richardson K, Rockström J, et al.; year: 2015; journal: Science; doi: 10.1126/science.1259855
- Title: "The global tree restoration potential"; Tags: Reference, Restoration; Fields: author: Bastin JF, Finegold Y, Garcia C, et al.; year: 2019; journal: Science; doi: 10.1126/science.aax0848
- Title: "Climate change and food security"; Tags: Reference, Climate; Fields: author: Wheeler T, von Braun J; year: 2013; journal: Science; doi: 10.1126/science.1239402

Additionally, create a tiddler titled "Bibliography" tagged "Navigation" that uses a list widget to display all tiddlers tagged "Reference" sorted by the year field. The list must display each tiddler's title as a link, followed by its author and year fields.

expected_references.title: Global warming of 1.5°C
expected_references.author: Masson-Delmotte V, Zhai P, Pörtner HO, et al.

expected_references.title: Biodiversity loss and its impact on humanity
expected_references.author: Cardinale BJ, Duffy JE, Gonzalez A, et al.

expected_references.title: Planetary boundaries: Guiding human development on a changing planet
expected_references.author: Steffen W, Richardson K, Rockström J, et al.

expected_references.title: The global tree restoration potential
expected_references.author: Bastin JF, Finegold Y, Garcia C, et al.
